allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 7039,5280 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name} }")
